output.sparql:
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?yards WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q815146 ; wdt:P361 wd:Q151 .
  ?player wdt:P31 wd:Q568 ; wdt:P641 ?game .
  ?player p:P2528 ?stat .
  ?stat ps:P2528 ?yards .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?yards)
LIMIT 1
